title: Board backups/snapshots
excerpt: It would be massively useful to be able to create a backup or snapshot of a board and its contents that can be restored at a later point. So often I find us importing data or making what could be large changes to a board…

posts.author: tcmarimosa (Tom Crawley)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be massively useful to be able to create a backup or snapshot of a board and its contents that can be restored at a later point. So often I find us importing data or making what could be large changes to a board and having to duplicate the board just to keep a copy of it.
